title: ophrys reinholdii subsp. straussii
intro: Ophrys reinholdii subsp. straussii, also known as the Strauss's Bee Orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ophrys reinholdii subsp. straussii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Ophrys reinholdii subsp. straussii are typically made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in water or alcohol, and are used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
